title: Aggregate Metrics by Service
description: Parse a metrics log where each line contains a service name and a latency in milliseconds. Aggregate the data per service to produce min, max, average, and count statistics. Return a dictionary keyed by service name with nested stats dictionaries.
constraints: Each line is space-separated: service_name latency_ms
Return {service: {min, max, avg, count}} for each service
avg must be rounded to 2 decimal places
Return empty dict for empty input

examples.explanation: auth has 3 samples (100, 150, 50): min=50, max=150, avg=100.0. api has 2 samples (200, 300): min=200, max=300, avg=250.0.
